chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Revision Application No.114 of 2023 Date Orders with Signatures of Judges 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of MA No.5967/2023 30.05.2025. Mr. Aslam Pervaiz, Advocate for the Respondent No.2 Ms. Amna Ansari, APG Through instant revision, applicant/accused in ID Complaint No.77 of 2022 prays for stopping further proceedings in the aforesaid case pending before 3rd Additional Sessions Judge, Karachi East, as civil suits are pending between the parties. However, on the directions of this Court, the learned 3rd Additional Sessions Judge, Karachi East, has submitted a report that during pendency of the instant revision application, the ID Complaint No.77 of 2022 filed by the Respondent Muhammad Kashif has been disposed of vide Judgment dated 22.04.2024 and applicant has been acquitted of the charge in terms of Section 245(i) Cr.P.C. In the circumstances, this revision application is dismissed as having become infructuous. Judge
